name: Signaturit
description: Spanish eSignature and digital onboarding API with legally binding signatures and KYC workflows for EU.

seo.title: Signaturit — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Signaturit: Spanish eSignature and digital onboarding API with legally binding signatures and KYC workflows for EU.

when_to_use: eIDAS-compliant digital signature API for EU contract workflows
KYC-embedded document signing for Spanish fintech onboarding
Qualified electronic signature (QES) for high-trust use cases
Audit trail generation for legally binding document evidence
Digital onboarding API with identity verification and signature

pros: KYC and identity verification bundled in workflows
Strong Spanish and EU regulatory expertise
SMS and biometric evidence supports legal weight
cons: Brand recognition weaker outside Spain and LATAM
UI and developer experience lag DocuSign and Dropbox Sign
Less integration depth with US-centric CRMs
Pricing not as transparent as freemium competitors
review.verdict: A credible EU alternative to DocuSign with KYC, but outside EU markets there are better-supported options.
review.best_for: Spanish and EU businesses combining eSignature with KYC onboarding
review.not_for: US-centric workflows where DocuSign or Dropbox Sign dominate
